the College's Education Department were the instructors for the two

courses. Special consultants for the training include: HaréJd Carlton,

Mayne, Associate in Adult Education, State Education Department; Kenneth Long, Assistant in Safety Edusstion, State Btusstion Dopartnent; Janos R, Barrett, Director of Driver Safety ond Improvement, State Depart- | mont of Notor lisles; Arnold W.
